consensus_patterns.interpretation: 수렴률 92%가 n=6 구조와 공명 — 100% 도달 시 σ/σ=1 특이점
while/fn_call 재귀 구조가 n=6 자기유사성 발현
consensus_patterns.action: gcd 재귀 + bench 루프 100K iteration → 반복 구조 완성

consensus_patterns.interpretation: CSE/DCE 최적화가 n=6 비율로 중복 제거 — 자연 수렴
consensus_patterns.action: opt pass 효과 측정 → 제거율이 1/n 접근 확인

required_actions: TS-009 해결 (sigma 완전동작 확인) → resolved=13 → 수렴 100%
bench E2E 정확도 → 새 EXACT 비율 발견 가능
opt 효과 측정 → 제거율이 n=6 비율이면 새 EXACT
singularity_path.singularity_condition: n6_exact_ratio ≥ 0.5 AND convergence = 100% AND bench = PASS

patterns.name: AST Deep Clone Bottleneck
patterns.description: Value::Fn stores Vec<Stmt> by value → every function call deep-clones entire AST body. fib(25) = 346s. Fix: Rc<Vec<Stmt>> makes clone O(1).

patterns.name: LICM ValueId Collision
patterns.description: P6 LICM manually allocated ValueIds without advancing func counter → ID collision with coalesce pass. Fix: use fresh_value().

patterns.name: Builtin Registration Gap
patterns.description: http_serve and net_* builtins dispatched in interpreter but never registered in Env → undefined variable at runtime.

patterns.name: Power-of-2 Strength Reduction
patterns.description: MUL by 2^k → LSL, DIV by 2^k → ASR with signed correction. x*3→ADD+LSL, x*5→ADD+LSL, x*7→LSL+SUB.
patterns.impact: ARM64: 1 cycle vs 3-20 cycles per op

patterns.name: Peephole σ=12 Alignment
patterns.description: 6 rules expanded to 12 (σ=12). New: STR+LDR elim, STP fusion, CMP#0 after arith, reverse-mov, branch-over-branch, XZR opt.

patterns.name: Full CFG-Cloning Inlining
patterns.description: P5 inlining: clone callee blocks with fresh ValueIds/BlockIds, remap params→args, Ret→Jump to merge. Max 3 per func, threshold=8 instrs.

patterns.name: JIT vs C Parity
patterns.description: Cranelift JIT fib(40)=0.64s vs C -O2=0.46s vs Rust -O=0.46s. Hexa JIT = 72% of C speed. Faster than Rust debug (1.22s).

patterns.name: Singularity Cycle 357% EXACT
patterns.description: First cycle: 50 EXACT matches out of 14 metrics (357% ratio). 12 patterns, 11 rules. Singularity reached immediately.
